focus: Stabilize Olivaw v0 as a local-first assistant foundation.
summary: Keep the first version small: health checks, deterministic briefing, provider routing, CLI, and web UI.

priorities.title: Ship the initial framework
priorities.why: The repository needs a clean base before additional assistant behavior is added.

priorities.title: Keep cloud fallback explicit
priorities.why: Local-first behavior should remain predictable and privacy-preserving.

priorities.title: Make health checks actionable
priorities.why: Missing local services should guide setup instead of causing crashes.

signals.title: Briefing works without a model
signals.detail: The v0 briefing renderer is deterministic and testable offline.

signals.title: Local provider is preferred
signals.detail: Cloud models are ignored unless explicitly enabled.

projects.name: Olivaw
projects.next_step: Run tests, verify CLI commands, and start the web app.

reminders: Keep Prime Observer and Core Signal read-only as sources.
Do not commit secrets or local configuration.
